---
name: "Feature Request"
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for PhysLink
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Is your feature request related to a problem?

_A clear and concise description of the problem you are trying to solve. (e.g. "It is difficult to do X because…")_

## Describe the solution you'd like

_A clear and concise description of the feature you would like to see implemented._

## Describe alternatives you've considered

_Have you considered any alternative approaches or workarounds? Why do they fall short?_

## Additional context

_Any other context, references, or screenshots that support this feature request._
